summary: Based on the product of effective collateral and time, ERC2917 calculates the reward a user can get at any time, and realize the real decentralized DeFi. Here below is the formula for the calculation of reward for a user U: ![concept image](../assets/eip-2917/erc-reward-formula.png "erc-reward-formula") where ∆p<sub>i</sub> denotes individual productivity of the user U between the consecutive block numbers t<sub>i-1</sub> and t<sub>i</sub>, ∆P<sub>i</sub> denotes global productivity between the consecutive block numbers t<sub>i-1</sub> and t<sub>i</sub>, and ∆G<sub>i</sub> denotes gross product between the consecutive block numbers t<sub>i-1</sub> and t<sub>i</sub>. The formula ensures that there is no benefit in case of exiting earlier or entering later in the computation. The reward a us
title: Staking Reward Calculation
